review_findings.finding: Stage 6 had no whole-stage review gate or evidence after Phase 6.1/6.2/6.3 candidate pass.
review_findings.fix: Added STAGE6_WHOLE_STAGE_REVIEW.md, whole_stage_review evidence pack, risk/rollback, terminal log, changed files, and contract test.
review_findings.verification: test_v024_stage6_whole_review_contract.py covers artifacts, scope, phase consistency, acceptance checks, stop conditions, findings, and non-upload gate.

review_findings.finding: Roadmap evidence pack required desktop_light_home.png and mobile_responsive.png, but Phase 6.1-6.3 evidence did not include review-time browser screenshots.
review_findings.fix: Added validate_v024_stage6_whole_review_browser.js and generated desktop, mobile, and settings isolation screenshots.
review_findings.verification: browser_validation.json status=pass, desktop_light_home_screenshot=true, mobile_responsive_screenshot=true, screenshot files exceed 20000 bytes.

review_findings.finding: Browser validation found computed body background-color was transparent because the v0.2.4 body background used only a gradient shorthand.
review_findings.fix: Added v0.2.4 body background-color fallback after the gradient declaration.

review_findings.finding: Trend chart canvas still read root CSS variables, so empty chart slots could render with an old dark block despite Stage 6 light tokens.
review_findings.fix: Updated shell.js cssColor() to read body scoped variables before documentElement variables.
review_findings.verification: browser validation screenshot regenerated with light chart slot; Stage 6 visual/browser validation status=pass.
